word: G4847 - συμπολίτης - sympolítēs - soom-pol-ee'-tace - Fellow- citizen

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (ஆண்பால்)
possessing the same citizenship with others, a fellow - citizen
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G4177; a native of the same town, that is, (figuratively) co-religionist (fellow Christian): - fellow-citizen.
